cost_model.access_cost_convention: item at 0-based rank r costs r + 1
cost_model.free_exchanges: after an access, the requested item may move for free to any earlier 0-based position, including staying in place
cost_model.name: full_cost_standard_free_after_access
cost_model.offline_oracle_paid_exchanges: unit-cost adjacent exchanges, canonicalized before access by the existing DP

oracle.finite_minimax_todo: No public interface was found for a true minimax value over online policy strategy spaces; this harness integrates the exact offline trace oracle and finite adversarial trace enumerator.
